description_cn: 将闭合的多段线向内或向外拉，来让它的面积变成指定面积大小。使多边形的面积按照设定的面积大小变化。（实际上会产生交叉，即正面积-负面积=指定面积。）
description_en: Pulling a closed polyline inwards or outwards changes its area to a specified size. This makes the area of ​​a polygon change according to a set size. (In practice, this will create intersections, i.e., positive area - negative area = specified area.)

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

author: Kangaroo Team
